message:
add 39 unit tests for model.rs + stage concurrent agent work

model.rs: comprehensive unit tests for Message enum serde roundtrips,
UserContent untagged deserialization, StopReason, ContentBlock variants,
Usage/Cost defaults, ThinkingLevel (FromStr/Display/budgets), and
AssistantMessageEvent type tags.

Also stages: streaming hostcall protocol tests (extensions.rs),
linter reformats (e2e_tui.rs, e2e_rpc.rs), node_fs_shim fix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
